svg.title: LithePG package verifier executable-mode gate
svg.desc: Evidence summary for the v1.0 package verification gate rejecting unsafe executable modes on Contents/MacOS/LithePGApp.

g.text: ✕ Reject special executable bits: setuid 4755, setgid 2755, sticky 1755
✕ Reject writable executable modes: group-writable chmod 775 and world-writable chmod 757
✓ Preserve existing executable requirement before metadata and size verification
Failure: package verification failed: app executable mode is unsafe

svg.text: TDD evidence: RED package verifier test, GREEN verifier + adjacent release helper tests, syntax checks, diff check, swift build.
